Ad Text:
Role: Release Analyst
Day Rate: $850 - $950 + Super
Contract Length: Initial contract until October 2026
Location: Macquarie Park/WFH Flex (mandatory 3 days p/w onsite)

We're partnering with a large organisation delivering a significant technology transformation and are seeking an experienced Release Analyst to support the coordination and delivery of platform releases.

This role will sit between engineering, DevOps and delivery teams, helping to coordinate releases, manage environments, and ensure changes move smoothly through the development lifecycle. It suits someone who understands Salesforce environments, CI/CD pipelines and the practical realities of managing releases across multiple teams.

Key Responsibilities

Coordinate and manage application releases across Salesforce and related platforms

Facilitate release planning, scheduling and deployment activities across teams

Triage release issues and work with engineers to resolve conflicts and blockers

Manage Salesforce sandbox environments and support release readiness

Monitor change progression through the SDLC and ensure governance processes are followed

Use Jira to track releases, manage dependencies and communicate status updates

Support DevOps practices including CI/CD pipelines and deployment processes

Work closely with engineering, QA and delivery teams to ensure smooth release cycles

About You

Experience coordinating application releases in complex environments

Understanding of Salesforce environments and sandbox management

Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices

Strong knowledge of SDLC, change management and release governance

Experience using Jira for release tracking and coordination

Ability to triage issues, manage competing priorities and keep delivery on track

Strong communication and stakeholder coordination skills

If you enjoy being the person who keeps releases running smoothly and ensures teams can deliver safely and efficiently, this could be a great opportunity to join a large transformation program.

Role Details

Location: Brisbane
Division: Data and Technology
Reports to: ServiceNow Uplift Project Manager
Job Type: Contract
Rate - $700.00 - $800.00 per day + Super

Primary Purpose

The ServiceNow Uplift Technical Lead provides technical governance, implementation assurance, and structured requirements translation across the uplift program.

The role ensures that:

The Yokohama → Zurich → Australia upgrade path is stable, fully remediated, and regression-safe
The MVP build faithfully implements the approved operating model
Future phases are delivered on a sustainable architectural foundation
System Integrator delivery meets agreed requirements and avoids technical debt
Platform configuration underpins workforce management and front-door governance

The role does not perform build activities.  All configuration and development is delivered by the System Integrator.

Works closely with:

Project Change Manager
Permanent ServiceNow Platform Lead
Operating Model and Change Lead at programme level

Oversees: System Integrator technical delivery within project governance arrangements

Key Responsibilities

Upgrade Governance
Operating Model Implementation Assurance
Requirements and Test Governance
MVP Delivery Governance
Future Phase Architecture Governance
Configuration and Integration Oversight
Vendor Technical Accountability

Skills & Capabilities

Senior ServiceNow platform governance experience
Experience overseeing multi-family upgrades
Ability to interpret HealthScan outputs
Strong understanding of ITIL-based service management
Experience working with System Integrators
Experience supporting phased enterprise transformation
